title: Lady Gaga in Harlequin Live: One Night Only
original_title: Lady Gaga in Harlequin Live: One Night Only
overview: Lady Gaga in Harlequin Live: One Night Only is a cinematic concert film by Lady Gaga centered on Harlequin. The film was recorded during an intimate, fan-only performance at The Belasco in Los Angeles, where Gaga performed the album in its entirety.
